narrative:
84 Ohio House district has 76,573 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -18.6% D−R vs -37.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
